channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Should I buy more BTC or altcoins? — 56 replies — 224.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Should I buy more BTC or altcoins?

Open thread • Replies: 56 • Updated: 2026-04-05 16:41 UTC

OP

BTC is steady and battle-tested. Altcoins can go up more but are riskier.

>You buying more BTC like Saylor does or alts like ETH and SOL this cycle?

Early replies (first 3)

62059768
I'm going all in on SOL

62059809
>>62059007
Allocating a small portion to CreditScoreProtocol * com can generate substantial wealth

62061375
>>62059768
Why all in on SOL?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62067657
>>62067204
I need Bitcoin. 100 btc

62069260
>>62067554
It’s a lot better than just holding your BTC with no return. More people should explore how BTCFi works now.

62069267
>>62065091
You're just doing the right thing anon.

62070210
>>62061834
Never heard of that anon

62071949
>>62069260
IF YOU'RE TALKING DEFI. ID GO FOR ETHEREUM AND SOLANA

62071968
Pls stop saylor. Stop

62071975
>>62067166
Do it eyyyyyy

62072569
>>62071949
Yeah ETH and Solana are solid, but only ~1% of BTC is in DeFi. Lots to explore, like Trustless Bitcoin Vaults, which will let BTC earn yield, be used as collateral, or participate in lending. That’s just getting started anon.

62072572
>>62065610
Are you also diversifying?

62072782
>>62059007
>Why nobody is talking xrp?

62072785
>>62067204
zero

62072829
>>62065610

62073188
>>62065656
He knows

62073628
>>62072782
stablecoin

62073641
>>62059007
if you guys could buy as much bitcoin as you can, driving the price up to and over $96,000 so that I can make my exit, that would be great. thanks a bunch.

62073652
>>62073641
You're just coward to hold and wait till 5 years

62073673
>>62072569
Defi hacks are everywhere

62073687
>>62073641
For God sake

62075889
>>62066497
I dont know. Maybe your trump coin will lol

62076395
>>62059007
quantum threats good luck

62076433
>>62059007
BTC or nothing, smart anons are staking and just waiting for the pump.

62076441
>>62067554
>>62071949
ignore the jeet shilling his staking btc scam. He shills it in every thread.
Are you guys really that stupid to not realize this? The jeet was shilling some privacy defi scam before, forgot the name. It's probably some LLM bot tbqh

62076475
BTC will hit $70000 before the end of today, buy now.

Trust me.

62076605
>>62076441
Wtf is that jeez

62076963
>>62072569
Only a few BTCFi projects like bablylon can boast of TBVs, others are still offering wrapped BTC staking

62078281
>>62076475
Trust me lol

62078766
>>62066485
Because?

62078785
Meanwhile........

62079308
>>62076433
What??

62079466
>>62078785
Can someone remake this meme in reverse?

item.title: remember when linkies had hope. now all they have is PAIN. lmao and don't forget the misery. dabble on a little humiliat… — 64 replies — 136.0/hr

Open thread • Replies: 64 • Updated: 2026-04-05 16:28 UTC

OP

remember when linkies had hope. now all they have is PAIN. lmao and don't forget the misery. dabble on a little humiliation as well. and last but not least: incel rage hahahahhahaah

Early replies (first 3)

62015997
yikes

62016663
>>62015997
>yIkEs

62016952
Adem. He won

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62048655
asdjkl;

62050929
everybody HATES STIIINKIIIIIIES hahahha

62050936
>>62045180
That'd be the end. But until then: 

62051982


62054375
fuck em all so much
hate em all think they're dumb so gay too
hate all stinks
fuckin cringe ass niggas

62054396
>>62054375

62054429
>>62015802
I remember the Summer of Dreams like it was yesterday.

62054451
>>62054429
>The world was at my fingertips!
>Waking up every day feeling high and mighty
We got too cocky linkmarines! HAHHAHAHAHAHAHAHHAHAA

62054546
>>62045180
bro , link didnt even break ath this cycle. there is no hope for link. cant even ride up with bitcin, founders atill dump millions. ita only going to go lower.

not even trying to fud. no clarity act wont increase hype. and no banks are not trying to surpress price.

there is no hype and no demand. no community ,

62054560
Even the AIs have hope now

62054650
>>62015802
I admire your dedication OP. The amount of eternally poor linkfag seethe that you have generated is more than all the twitter fudders put together. Respect.

62054880
>>62054560
cisco is a good comparison, except it's like 2005 instead of 1996.
just 20 more years until we get back to all time high!

62055022
soon all stinkies will be so poor they won't even know what's going on anymore. they'll be like: wtf, where'd my money gooooo lmao lmao LOL LOL lmao

62057405
i'll never ever ever stop laughin at stuuupid stiiiinks. hate em alllll
think they suuuuuuck

62057472
>>62015802
>>62015997
linkedin<ko-fi and patreon

62059066
>>62055022
Checked.
Except, they'll know exactly where their money went. The regrets are gonna haunt them up to the day they rope

62060805
>>62054560
alpha like this being openly posted daily is why ill have no sympathy for nolinkers in the future
>b...but we didnt know
kek

62061283
KABOOOOOOOOM

LINK

62062571
>>62060805
>AI slop is le alpha
I'm convinced these posts are some kind of bait
there's no way people that stupid actually exist

62063638
pain & misery

62066641
fuck em all

62067896
this is brutal how do they even cope? buy silver its about to moon

62070028
Fuck all the cuckolds who spammed /biz/ for 9 years

LMAOOOOO

62070732
hate link
simple as

62072180
fuck em all
truke

62073448
cuckoldry

62076967
>>62015802
Luckily, I dumped it for BTC and staked it on Babylon. Although the price is back to when I just started staking, it's still better than holding LINK

62078207
fuck all stinks
loathe all stinks
despise all stinks
detest all stinks

62079414
>>62015802
still never met a linky

item.title: Calling all high IQ anons (not political nuts) here — 25 replies — 83.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
Calling all high IQ anons (not political nuts) here

Open thread • Replies: 25 • Updated: 2026-04-05 16:38 UTC

OP

How does Trump's political actions affect crypto positively? There must be something positively to all of this

Early replies (first 3)

62067242
There's a bitcoin toll booth at the hormussy now

62067263
>>62067233
Negative:
Trump is causing all kinds of uncertainty with his erratic decisions on macroeconomic points like global tariffs and wars.
Crypto being a high risk asset, it absolutely eats shit on this aspect.

Positive:
He's pushing for more crypto-positive legislation, meaning institutional adoption is getting closer and closer.

The negative point hits the speculative side of crypto; which also happens to be the sole price mover in all of crypto's history.
The positive point benefits actual mass adoption, which has not happened yet in all of crypto's history.

So on the whole the positive should massively outweigh the negative.

62072495
>>62067233
ignore all externalities of news and politics, focus on PA and trade how it was intended

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62072514
>>62067233
You ask that question like most of his actions have been bullish.

There was a big narrative that everybody was hyping themselves over, and that was him firing Gensler and making the SEC more altcoin friendly, that was the second biggest narrative that rivaled Blackrock getting spot BTC ETF's. That's supposed to be bullish, but 2025 was meh for altcoins compared to the price action in 2024 when he wasn't even president yet.

62073189
>>62067233
Extremely positively.

Trump banned CDBCs, Central bank cryptos. Basically slave electronic money that would track you.
And allowed regular cryptos.
Now the main boomer in Swift who was blocking crypto and XRP got fired.

>Now That XRP is Dead, What’s Next? Swift Executive Calls Ripple a Dead Chain Walking
>sep 2 2025
https://99bitcoins.com/news/altcoins/now-that-xrp-is-dead-whats-next-swift-executive-calls-ripple-a-dead-chain-walking/

Got fired out of SWIFT , 4 3 2026, 6 months later.
Another boomer who was blocking crypto and xrp got removed.

62073192
>>62072514
>There was a big narrative that everybody was hyping themselves over, and that was him firing Gensler and making the SEC more altcoin friendly,
This.
Also Trump's new FED chair that will soon start is crypto friendly.

62073195
>>62073189
>Tom Zschach
>blocking crypto

you're retarded

62073199
>>62073189
>Got fired out of SWIFT , 4 3 2026, 6 months later.
Today's news:
Tom Zschach is Stepping down as CIO of Swift

62073203
>>62073195
>Now That XRP is Dead, What’s Next?
>Swift Executive Calls Ripple a Dead Chain Walking
>sep 2 2025
You can find more links to those news .

62073212
>>62073203
The news isn't what makes you retarded

62073214
>>62073212
Got you, your low iq "expert" opinion does.

62073217
>>62073214
Has nothing to do with my opinion either.

62073223
>>62073217
The OP asked only high iq smart people here,
and that's not you.

62073358
crypto is dead

62073512
>>62067233
Crypto is dead already. Quantum computing will hack Bitcoin in ~3 years and that will be that.

62073546
>>62067233
you’re a silly guy with your framing of the question toward a single outcome of positivity

62073550
>>62073189
>XRP
BOOOOOOOOOOOOOM

62074303
>>62067233
>The US government takes over Venezuelan oil fields in the name of narco-terrorism.
>The staged war cuts off Gulf States' oil supply
>US will have a monopoly on energy
>Ceasefire
>Treasuries are sold
>USD is printed
>CLARITY act revisions with stablecoin yields encourage swaps to securities and commodities
>CLARITY act passes
>More ETFs are approved
>Large US financial firms, like Black Rock, tokenize RWAs
>Midterms

62075049
>>62067233
Correlation between BTC and gold is 0.85 ie its basically digital gold. Fiat currencies go up BTC will go down. I think BTC is a great hedge against a 2008 style crash, though not at the start when everyone just wants money. If US discredits the dollar more it could lose credence as the catalyst for international finance. Alternatives like BTC would do good.

62075726
>>62067263
What would mass adoption look like and will it ever happen?

62076494
Go hard in BTC or ETH. Other coins will exist and make people money but it won't be a market like gold/btc, more in the sense of aluminium or whatever.
The next generation uses crypto a lot, streamers are constantly pushing it and those niggers along with us can change it in to a more crypto adaptle world. Be the change nigga, don't wait for a handout. God favours the bold.

62076501
>>62073223
holy shit just shut the fuck up ya moron lmao

62076730
>>62067233
>How does Trump's political actions affect crypto positively?
it hasn't, yet. so far it's mostly been lip service. the only law passed so far has been the GENIUS act, which will kick in next year, but who knows what that will actually accomplish. everything else remains an unfulfilled promise

62076808
>>62076494
HYPE will absolutely mog your boomer couins for the simple reality that it's the best way to trade the stock market on Saturdays when Trump randomly decides to declare he's invading Kharg island and you aren't able to react normally to stock market moves because it's closed.

62079447
>>62067233
He normalized it.
Got millions of normies into the fold, average person understands what it is now

Open thread • Replies: 16 • Updated: 2026-04-05 16:49 UTC

OP

I'M YELLING ORANGE NIGGER

Early replies (first 3)

62068825
LIQUID NIGGER BAGGIES
NOT LIKE THIS!!!!!

62068922
keke we are all so fucked

62069266
>>62068800

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62069335
>>62069266

What a shitcoin.

62069609
>>62068922
When the strait is still closed after easter oil will be at $150

62069648
>>62068800

62071650
>>62069266
MY SHORTS, REEEEEEEE

62074419
>>62068825
> LIQUID NIGGER

62074626
>>62068825
>LIQUID NIGGER

62074629
>>62068800
112 you dipshit Jew.

62074689
>>62074629
because the market is closed but trump is threatning to invade iran to get the oil again

62074968
>>62074689
Trump is full of shit nobody cares about what he shit posts anymore.

62076851
>>62074968
If trump threatens specifically to bomb inftrastructure regarding oil production then the market cares very much what's gonna happen, you idiot.

62078198
so
polymarket is pricing LIQUID NIGGER to go to 120
orange orangutan is fucking finished

62078519
>>62068825

62079494
>>62068800
90 by eow

item.title: polymarket scam — 12 replies — 48.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
polymarket scam

Open thread • Replies: 12 • Updated: 2026-04-05 16:52 UTC

OP

This market allows you to bet on multiple timeframes for intentional US troops on Iranian ground.
But if you bet on December 31st you will win no matter if it happens in March or April or even February or any of the other betting options

HOW DOES THAT MAKE ANY LOGICAL SENSE?

So people who bet no for december 31st but yes for april 30 will lose all their money even though april won.

Early replies (first 3)

62078723
technically boots already were on the ground as the USA invaded Iran to save a couple pilots yesterday

62078725
>>62078723
You're missing the point. The point is that there was no reason to bet on april 30 because december 31 would win no matter which preceding date was right.

I am asking how this makes logical sense?

62078730
>>62078706
>gambling
>lose
>seething

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62078736
Nobody cares about this gambling shit no matter how much you advertise this crap

62078741
>>62078736
less gambling that stocks or crypto

62078742
>>62078706
polymarket is a literal actual scam if you dont use ur account for a few weeks they delete it and keep the money

62078777
>>62078706
Its all about odds. There's going to be less of a payout if you bet on the longer timeline

62078798
>>62078777
no there isn't
you would have made more money betting on later dates no matter when, whether in February, march or April.

62078814
>>62078798
Then that's the problem of the betters that they didn't see that the December bet is more safe.

62078825
>>62078814
No, it just doesn't make logical sense for there to be a bet where all the bets can win at the same time. Then what is the fucking point of choosing between the bets?

62078833
>>62078798
He's right. Just look at the graph of the historical odds or look at another market like the ceasefire ones

62079500
>>62078706
these sites are scams desu

Ive seen them use technicalities and jew scammery to not pay out a few bets and after that i just stay away from them entirely

item.title: NFT bros... — 12 replies — 48.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
NFT bros...

Open thread • Replies: 12 • Updated: 2026-04-05 16:49 UTC

OP

NFT bros...

Early replies (first 3)

62076986
He didn't buy it

62076987
Paying $1.3 million for an ugly monkey jpg is one of those most retarded things ever

62076990
>>62076986
Ah this is far more likely, they probably paid him 1.3 million just to act like he had anything to do with it

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62077015
>>62076986
Yeah it was part of a marketing team who paid celebs to say they bought it and gave them the nft

62077207
>>62077010
They wish they looked like that.

62078077
>>62076978
the bored ape looks heartbroken that its value dropped so much, kek

62078877
>>62076978
I see he still has that droopy vaxtard face

62079133
>>62076978
You guys are so dumb. He was approached like many others by the team that issued the NFTs. He was given one free and clear. He then bought the NFT from himself for $1.3 million. His 1.3 million is now in a new wallet that he controls. He likely traded this money for more crypto, to diversify. It was all a tax evasion scheme. Unfortunately for most of these clowns the market tanked and trapped them in losses they can't realize. Except bieber could sell his $15000 nft and claim a loss if he has any investment income to offset.

62079155
>>62079133
who the fuck is still buying NFTs

62079156
>>62076978
NFTs will come back btw

62079492
>>62077207
Who wishes who looked like what? A short bald guy?

item.title: >Setting up the next TACO for the market pump AGAIN. — 29 replies — 47.7/hr

OP

It's all so tiresome

Early replies (first 3)

62076909
>>62076906
but... what if... he doesnt taco this time........

62076912
>>62076906
how is this setting up the next TACO?

62076916
>>62076906
he's right though. The Scrum Masters are in trouble, so we need an emergency TACO and bailout.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62076917
>>62076912
Because he'll make up some bullshit about how Iran and the US made amazing progress with peace talks. He did the exact same thing two weeks ago on monday

62076919
>Gives 10 days for his insiders to accumulate monstrous shorts
>Actually bombs Iran to the stone age
I would not be surprised.

62076920
>>62076906
>remember when
The funny thing is nobody fucking remembered that lmao because he made up 10 more lies since then

62076922
>>62076906
Wake me up when they start carpet bombing Shiraz.

62076980
>>62076916
scrum master is some borat shit fakest job I ever heard of lmao

62077003
>>62076917
Iran has been getting pummeled all weeked. You retards act like nothing is being done.

62077004
>>62076906
Iran isn't gonna taco though. Why should they when they're winning. Keep it up until Israel is wrecked then the real run can begin.

62077041
>>62077003
>just 2 more weeks of bombing and they will give up and the one day special military operation will conclude

62077042
>>62076906
>hand over Gilgamesh and the staffs of the five wizards
>you have ten days, excluding banks holidays, except Martin Luther King day

62077047
>>62077003
They still controll the straits, retard. Strategically and economically they have 10x more leverage over Amerisharts. Bombing some school children and a bridge doesn't change that

62077102
>>62076906
>oil futures on binance
>crypto didnt even blink
Yeah, bottom is in!

62077224
>>62076906
I voted for this

62077248
>>62076906
everyone should remember that no matter what, you are not going to outsmart the jews in this market

62077597
>>62077370

62077711
>>62077248
jews are not smart they just imagine it to be
>>62077370
>>62077597
kek

62078193
>>62076906
He is calling himself God now, aw hell nah. Let every red state turn into a Pride Parade with furfags and gays in latex gimpsuits.

62078275
>>62076912
dying

62078370
fuck off moralfags

62078379
this guy is such a faggot, i want to short sooo badly, but the algos pump the charts 3-5% every time this idiot backs down.

62078435
>>62076906
> Glory be to GOD!
wtf?

62078979
>>62078435
He is quoting Chance the Rapper on Ultralight Beam

62079026
How can Iran still have power plants on Tuesday if they were bombed into the stone age today?

62079077
>>62079026
The miracles of Allah I guess lol

62079081
>>62079026
uhoh, melty

62079387
>>62079026
They've already rebuilt them.

item.title: The battle of the 3 /biz/nes groups — 11 replies — 44.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
The battle of the 3 /biz/nes groups

Open thread • Replies: 11 • Updated: 2026-04-05 16:52 UTC

OP

Link baggies, XRP baggies, Trump coin baggies. One year from now, who will win this battle?

Early replies (first 3)

62076357
>>62076345
None of them.

62076449
>>62076345
XRP WILL WIN

62076465
>>62076345
All losers across the board

Why would you want to hold any of those?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62076497
>>62076345
XRP, unironically, LINK will have piece of the pie too, Trump coin... shit is worse than doge

62076550
>>62076345
Link or none of them
Trump coin is nothing though, at least xrp has an uneducated cult and linkies have their connections (which has resulted in no profit)

62076565
I never even see TRUMP posts

62076571
>>62076345
xrp is paid marketing using bots to milk whatever retards wanders in here. Hardly a faction.

Trump coin is just another fun shitcoin. Hardly a faction

the real forces are /smg/ - silver - link

bad thread trying to create a false frame

62076573
>>62076345
> winning

62078321
>>62076345
>who will win this battle?
silver

62079483
>>62076345
xrp baggies are the ones I run into

62079503
>>62079483
>baggies

How can I be a baggie if i'm in profit tho?

item.title: Did you guys see that just recently HEX became the 3rd most held token on all of Ethereum? — 16 replies — 34.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
Did you guys see that just recently HEX became the 3rd most held token on all of Ethereum?

Open thread • Replies: 16 • Updated: 2026-04-05 16:28 UTC

OP

Did you guys see that just recently HEX became the 3rd most held token on all of Ethereum?
Only behind USDC and Tether

Does this give it more legitimacy or will most see through this mass marketing dust campaign?
Either way, it's not cheap to send your coin to 5 million people in a shill campaign.....

Early replies (first 3)

62077138
>>62077135
its totally legit saar, ape in lifesavings!

62077151
read pic
I bca finding out which "wrong-talk" did I type that our janitor is malding over

62077172
>>62077151
Airdropping a fresh coin would mess everything up, so if you're going to fork it anyways, why not make a new chain where the ETH FagFoundation can't make another update that fucks it all up with higher fees?

I agree there is a lot of hate-marketing out there giving bad optics, so many twitter accounts hating and shitting on RH and his coins daily and you just know it's all fueled by rage over their bags they're down bad on

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62077902
fuck off heart you gangster fuck

62077984
>>62077902
how is it so hard to find him? hes literally in estonia and probably hits up the luxury stores once a week lol

62078130
>>62077984
When X enabled location info for profiles last year his account showed south east asia.

>>62077902
fake news, all assault charges have been dropped
it was quite possibly completely made up just to get him on the interpol list since you can't be on there for non-violent crimes.

62078173
>>62077135
What’s the difference between pHEX, eHEX and HEX in ethereum? I can’t tell you because idgaf I’m all in pDAI niggers

62078189
>>62077172
>why not make a new chain where the ETH FagFoundation can't make another update that fucks it all up with higher fees?
because you're overcomplicating the project which was supposed to be pure game-theory of stakers vs LPers/ traders

now you have a shitshow that sent this to a -99% death chart
it's dead because of it

>Airdropping a fresh coin would mess everything up
it would mess NOTHING up
hex was an airdrop to bitcoin holders in the first place

62078192
>>62078173
see
this is what I mean
now you have the pDAI shitshow
you have pHEX, eHEX, pulseX
it's a fucking circus

richard fucking failed because he didn't listen to his own advice

62078714
>>62078130
sure thing mr goldstein

62078715
>>62078130
>non-violent
rape is a violent crime

62078740
>>62078173
pDAI to Dorra.

62078749
>>62077135
>3rd most wash-traded coin on ethereum
Ftfya

62079415
>>62078740
>pDAI to Dorra.
Pulsechain needs its own native stabefuck. $1 is inevitable

item.title: Is it worth it to pay the penalty to cash out my 401k and dca into MSTR? — 6 replies — 24.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Is it worth it to pay the penalty to cash out my 401k and dca into MSTR?

Open thread • Replies: 6 • Updated: 2026-04-05 16:48 UTC

OP

Is it worth it to pay the penalty to cash out my 401k and dca into MSTR?

Early replies (first 3)

62079019
Don't ever touch your 401k retard thats fake money that you dont have.

62079034
>>62079012
>Is it worth it to pay the penalty to cash out my 401k and [do something else with it]
Almost never. Unless you've got some insanely retarded debt with ultra high interest rates or a life or death medical emergency, you have to leave it in the boomerk. It's frustrating, but think of it as the cost of the free money you got from your company's match.

62079038
>>62079012
>MSTR
Cash it out and go all in on 100% physical silver.
This is financial advice.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62079196
>>62079012
>Am I going to be a pussy faggot or take a chance and retire the next 10 generations of my bloodline?
MSTR is going to $4k at least, this is clown world after all so BTC at 1 million and sailor hailed as a genius is the only outcome that makes sense

62079251
>>62079038
I have some, but honestly a little worried about being able to sell without a 20% fee.
>>62079196
When do you think is a good idea to sell? I'm thinking to sell half at a 2x just to ride guarantee money or start to dca out after a 5x

62079488
>>62079012

I just kash'd out of my 401k. The 20% penalty is withheld and there's a 10% tax on the total amount withdrawn that hits next tax season.

My 401k had about half what OP's has and I watched it lose about 11-12k in just a couple months. When you zoom out the graph, you see that's a loss of like, FIVE YEARS of stock market gains. That shit ain't coming back ANY time soon and will continue to crash.

So while I'm cash poor and suffering like a good goy, what, I'm supposed to be patting myself on the back for not touching my 401k for another 30 years? If you're already down to the bare minimum in terms of your lifestyle, expense cutting, and fully embracing a diminished, microscopic life as a brokie 'cuz of a layoff, you're gonna want that money while stock prices are still "up". And my tardmath brokie risk-reward calculation is that 401k valuation will have dipped way below the 30% of taxes owed on withdrawing to the point where I'd STILL be a cash poor brokie and STILL be bagholding a 401k.

item.title: So bullish XRP — 13 replies — 21.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
So bullish XRP

Open thread • Replies: 13 • Updated: 2026-04-05 16:21 UTC

OP

So bullish XRP

Early replies (first 3)

62063169
SO BULLISH BROS. X POWER!!!!

62063173
HOLY FXCKING BXLLISH

62064112
>>62063140

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62064175
TO THE MQQQQQQQQQQQN

62066664
>>62063140
So bullish

62067690
>>62063140
BOOOOOOOOOOM

62070439
I've been on /biz/ since 2017 and I always ignored XRP and their memes. I just see your shit in the catalog and that's it. Who is that guy supposed to be? Where did the BOOOM originate from? And who is this >>62063169 wolverine dude?

62070518
>>62063140
its like there's a single marketing firm out there using the exact same strategy to shill dirty baggies to chuds and they fall for it every time

62072350
>>62063140
BOOOOOOOOOOOOOOM

62076074
>>62063140
KABOOOOOOOM

62078520
>>62063140
BOOOOOOOOOOOM

62078772
>>62070439
wasn't he an extra character in Community?

62079390
>>62063140
So bullish

item.title: Why don't they factor inflation into the gains of the S&P 500? — 10 replies — 18.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
Why don't they factor inflation into the gains of the S&P 500?

Open thread • Replies: 10 • Updated: 2026-04-05 16:24 UTC

OP

Why don't they factor inflation into the gains of the S&P 500?

When hyperinflation hits, the S&P will soar and the people on TV will tell us that this is a great thing.

The stocks in Zimbabwe probably went up significantly during hyperinflation but that doesn't mean their economy was doing well--assuming Zimbabwe even has a stock market.

Early replies (first 3)

62078042
and roman stocks probably went through the roof as the denarius lost it's silver content. checkmate economists.

62078049
>>62078032
>Why don't they factor inflation into the gains of the S&P 500?
Stop being antisemetic

62078051
>>62078032
Inflation adjusted returns are pretty shitty for indexes if you think about it,

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62078061
>>62078049
The Khazars need to embrace Christ Jesus in order to overcome their curse.

62078106
> When hyperinflation hits, the S&P will soar
lol. lmao, even

62078108
Stop dealing in the real world goyim

62078110
>>62078106
When the time comes that you'll need a wheel barrow filled with fiat to buy bread, you will also need a wheel barrow filled with cash to buy a cheap stock.

62078124
>why don't they point out that it's a scam?
Gee I don't know

62078138
>>62078124
Good point. Nevertheless, it would be nice if someone would account for inflation in their S&P reporting.

62079398
>>62078032
because then they wouldn't be gains

item.title: I'm graduating in a month and I have no clue if I'll have a teaching job over seas wtf do I do? — 3 replies — 12.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
I'm graduating in a month and I have no clue if I'll have a teaching job over seas wtf do I do?

Open thread • Replies: 3 • Updated: 2026-04-05 16:43 UTC

OP

I'm graduating in a month and I have no clue if I'll have a teaching job over seas wtf do I do? Get deep into unemployment culture until bottom gets in or risk being getting cut after 6 months due to my ideal SE Asian surfing village going under?

Early replies (first 3)

62077402
sounds like its already over before it even began. better luck next time (next life).

62077698
You should do everything you can to skate by in life by doing the bare minimum. Sounds like you're just waiting around to die in a humid environment with people who don't give a fuck about you.

62079470
>>62077388
look for a job

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

No additional replies in the latest window.
